query:
_sourcecategory=oar*  {{keywords}}
AND _view = sumologic_audit_events

| json field=_raw "eventName"
| json field=_raw "operator.source_ip" as source_ip nodrop
| json field=_raw "operator.interface" as interface nodrop
| json field=_raw "operator.email" as email nodrop
| json field=_raw "subsystem"

| timeslice
| count as events by email ,_timeslice
| transpose row _timeslice column email

//| sort _messagetime | fields -events

queryParameters.name: keywords
queryParameters.description: // any keyword expression for audit events

sources.panelTitle: Events Over Time By User Email

variables.name: keywords
variables.values: // any keyword expression for audit events
